channel.title: GitHub Kotlin Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Kotlin in GitHub

item.title: android/nowinandroid
item.description: A fully functional Android app built entirely with Kotlin and Jetpack Compose

item.title: ethereum-lists/chains
item.description: provides metadata for chains

item.title: android/compose-samples
item.description: Official Jetpack Compose samples.

item.title: android/architecture-samples
item.description: A collection of samples to discuss and showcase different architectural tools and patterns for Android apps.

item.title: lizongying/my-tv-0
item.description: 我的電視·〇 電視視頻播放軟件，可以自定義視頻源

item.title: kizitonwose/Calendar
item.description: A highly customizable calendar view and compose library for Android and Kotlin Multiplatform.

item.title: z-huang/InnerTune
item.description: A Material 3 YouTube Music client for Android

item.title: mostafaalagamy/Metrolist
item.description: YouTube Music client for Android

item.title: bitwarden/android
item.description: Bitwarden mobile app for Android.

item.title: JetBrains/compose-multiplatform
item.description: Compose Multiplatform, a modern UI framework for Kotlin that makes building performant and beautiful user interfaces easy and enjoyable.

item.title: maxrave-dev/SimpMusic
item.description: A simple music app using YouTube Music for backend

item.title: NeoApplications/Neo-Store
item.description: An F-Droid client with modern UI and an arsenal of extra features.

item.title: Kotlin/kotlinx.coroutines
item.description: Library support for Kotlin coroutines

item.title: wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android
item.description: WordPress for Android

item.title: square/okhttp
item.description: Square’s meticulous HTTP client for the JVM, Android, and GraalVM.

item.title: tanujnotes/Olauncher
item.description: Minimal AF Launcher for Android. Reduce your screen time. Daily wallpapers.

item.title: KieronQuinn/Smartspacer
item.description: Smartspacer is a customisable widget for Android, but with a difference: It can upgrade the built in At a Glance on Pixels - without root!

item.title: InsertKoinIO/koin
item.description: Koin - a pragmatic lightweight dependency injection framework for Kotlin & Kotlin Multiplatform

item.title: tiann/KernelSU
item.description: A Kernel based root solution for Android

item.title: ankidroid/Anki-Android
item.description: AnkiDroid: Anki flashcards on Android. Your secret trick to achieve superhuman information retention.
